epics.summary: Enhance User Authentication and Account Management
epics.description: Improve the user experience and security of account creation and login, ensuring a seamless and reliable process for new users.
requirements: User authentication must be secure and reliable.
Account creation should be straightforward and intuitive.
Password reset functionality should be easily accessible.
epics.scope: Improve the overall user experience and security of account management.
risks: Security vulnerabilities could arise if authentication mechanisms are not robust.
User confusion regarding password reset process.
acceptance_criteria: Users can successfully reset their password with a valid email address.
Password reset process is easy to understand and complete.

user_stories.title: As a new user, I want to easily create an account with a clear and concise registration form.
user_stories.story: As a new user, I want to fill out the registration form with minimal required fields, so that I can quickly create an account and start using Facebook.
user_stories.description: The registration form should be intuitive and guide the user through the necessary steps.
acceptance_criteria: Form fields are clearly labeled and easy to understand.
The registration process completes within 30 seconds.

user_stories.title: As a registered user, I want to securely reset my password if I forget it.
user_stories.story: As a registered user, I want to be able to easily reset my password through a secure process, so that I can regain access to my account if I forget it.
user_stories.description: The password reset process should be straightforward and secure, utilizing email verification.
acceptance_criteria: Password reset link is sent to the user's email address.
Password reset process is completed within 5 minutes.

epics.summary: Improve Content Sharing and Social Integration
epics.description: Expand the functionality of sharing content and integrating with other social platforms to enhance user engagement and content discovery.
requirements: Users should be able to easily share content across multiple platforms.
The platform should seamlessly integrate with popular social media networks.
Content sharing should be intuitive and visually appealing.
epics.scope: Expand content sharing and social integration features.
dependencies: Enhanced user authentication is required for content sharing.
risks: Content sharing functionality could be complex and difficult to use.
Integration with social media platforms could be unreliable.
acceptance_criteria: Users can easily share content to Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter.
Content sharing is visually appealing and easy to understand.

user_stories.title: As a content creator, I want to quickly share my posts to Facebook and Instagram.
user_stories.story: As a content creator, I want to use a simple share button to quickly share my posts to Facebook and Instagram, so that I can reach a wider audience.
user_stories.description: The share button should be prominent and easy to find.
acceptance_criteria: Share button is clearly visible on all content.
Share button opens the correct sharing options.

user_stories.title: As a user, I want to easily follow other users on Facebook.
user_stories.story: As a user, I want to be able to easily follow other users on Facebook, so that I can stay updated on their posts and activities.
user_stories.description: The platform should provide a clear and intuitive way to follow users.
acceptance_criteria: Users can easily add users to their follow list.
Follow button is clearly visible on user profiles.
